search_queries_used: site:asahq.org basic standards preanesthesia care airway examination
site:rcoa.ac.uk previous anesthesia airway alerts assessment
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for Airway review documentation
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for Airway review documentation
rejection_reasons: Scoring pages do not provide exact documentation evidence and could imply an automatic risk conclusion.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients receiving anesthesia care, with emergency modification permitted by the source.
setting_applicability: Direct for preanesthesia assessment; postoperative-only or emergency airway management is outside scope.
UAE_applicability: International ASA evidence; UAE facility policy and clinician review remain required.
recency_verification: The ASA standard last affirmed in 2020 and current 2023 documentation statement were reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: No newer ASA basic preanesthesia standard was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA standard supports focused airway and physical-condition review before anesthesia; it does not classify or manage an airway automatically.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports previous-anesthesia history, medical therapy, focused examination, airway and physical-condition assessment, and factors affecting perioperative risk.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Airway review documentation; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Airway scores, predictors, device choice, technique, rescue pathway, and urgency remain unsupported.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
